title: RelianceRecord
description: A record of a data source the agent relied on during the run.

reliance_id.description: Unique identifier for this reliance record.

run_id.description: The run this reliance record belongs to.

source_name.description: Name of the data source that was consulted.

scope.description: Description of what aspect of the source was relied upon.

referenced_action_id.description: Optional reference to the action proposal that triggered this reliance.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the reliance was recorded.
